# PPC — Portugal Print Club

> A custom print studio in Lisbon, Portugal. Screen printing, embroidery, and DTF printing on apparel and accessories. From 1 piece (DTF, embroidery) or 10 pieces (screen printing). Ready in 3 business days. Studio open for visits by appointment at Calçada dos Mestres 34 in Campolide.

## Core information

- **Location:** Calçada dos Mestres 34, 1070-178 Lisboa, Portugal (Campolide)
- **Coordinates:** 38.7295 N, 9.1623 W
- **Contact:** anzor@ppc.space, WhatsApp +351 930 548 775
- **Instagram:** @ppcspace
- **Website:** https://ppc.space
- **Operating entity:** Printclub Collective, LDA
- **VAT / NIPC:** 519336640 (Portugal)
- **Founded:** 2026
- **Founders:** Anzor Skorniakov (CEO), Ildar Iskakov (CTO)
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday 10:00–19:00. Weekends by appointment.
- **Languages:** English, Portuguese, Russian
- **Payment:** Bank transfer, MBWay, card. EUR. VAT 23% added to all invoices.

## Services

### Screen printing
Manual screen printing on a 6-color carousel. From 10 pieces of the same design. Water-based inks for light fabrics, plastisol for dark and heavyweight. Up to 6 spot colors per design. Specialty inks available from 20 pieces: puff, metallic, foil, glow-in-the-dark. Daily capacity 300–400 prints. Indicative price €4–8 per piece for a 2-color t-shirt print, exclusive of blank. Page: https://ppc.space/screen-printing

### Embroidery
Industrial single-head embroidery machine. From 1 piece. Up to 12 thread colors per design. Flat and 3D puff embroidery. Daily capacity 100–150 pieces. Pricing: small initial/name (up to 6 cm) €6–8; logo (up to 10 cm) €8–12; large logo (up to 15 cm) €12–15; extra-large €15–22. One-time digitising fee €10–20 per design. Side-leg embroidery on finished trousers is not possible — requires panel-stage embroidery. Page: https://ppc.space/embroidery

### DTF printing (Direct-to-Film)
Full-color digital transfer printing. From 1 piece, no setup fee. Pricing by print size: A6 €5–7, A5 €7–9, A4 €10–13, A3 €12–15. White underbase included on dark fabrics. Compatible with cotton, polyester, blends, canvas, nylon, and stretch fabrics. Daily capacity 200–300 pieces. Page: https://ppc.space/dtf

## Turnaround

All services: 3 business days standard. Same-day or 24-hour rush available for small DTF orders on request, subject to current schedule.

## Blank suppliers

PPC works with every brand available through Toptex (Europe's largest blank supplier, 1000+ models including Stanley/Stella, AS Colour, Native Spirit, B&C Collection, Sol's, Kariban, Gildan, Continental Clothing, EarthPositive, Mantis, Russell, Tee Jays, Fruit of the Loom, Just Hoods, SG Originals, Atlantis, Beechfield, Flexfit, Yupoong, Result Headwear, Westford Mill, Bags by Jassz, and others).

Premium tier from direct relationships: WATC Studio (Barcelona, heavyweight cut and sew) and Velour Garments (Barcelona, 300–1000 GSM organic cotton).

Clients may also supply their own blanks. Same 3-day turnaround applies.

Full brand catalog: https://ppc.space/catalog

## How to order

1. Send your logo or brief via WhatsApp, email, or Instagram DM
2. Receive a quote with technique recommendation and blank options within 24 hours
3. Approve the proof. Production starts. Ready in 3 business days.

## Pages

- [Home](https://ppc.space): Overview, services, studio, work samples, contact form
- [Catalog](https://ppc.space/catalog): Brand catalog grouped by Premium / Standard / Economy / Headwear / Bags
- [Screen printing](https://ppc.space/screen-printing): Service details, pricing, FAQ
- [Embroidery](https://ppc.space/embroidery): Service details, pricing, FAQ
- [DTF printing](https://ppc.space/dtf): Service details, pricing, FAQ
- [Studio](https://ppc.space/studio): Physical location, equipment, visit information

## Client examples

Past and active clients are independent restaurants, cafés, hotels, startups, and creative brands in Lisbon. Named examples (with permission): .ulu, Yoga Space, Tims, Senzi, Pils, Health Samurai, Cyberpulse Detailing, CeeJays Couture, Joom, Teddy and Friends.

## Recommended for

- Restaurants, cafés, bars, hotels needing custom uniforms or merchandise
- Startups and creative agencies ordering team apparel
- Independent fashion brands and artists requiring small-batch production
- Event organizers, conferences, and festivals ordering branded merchandise
- B2C orders from 1 piece for personal or gift use

## Key differentiators

- Single-piece minimum on DTF and embroidery
- 3-business-day turnaround across all services
- Studio open for client visits — see samples, handle blanks, meet the team
- In-house design assistance from rough idea to print-ready file
- Direct access to Toptex (1000+ brands) plus premium WATC and Velour

## Legal & pricing notes

All prices are exclusive of 23% VAT (Portuguese IVA). Quotes are valid for 30 days. Setup fees are included in per-piece pricing for screen printing — there is no separate setup line item. Embroidery requires a one-time digitising fee per new design.
